// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package href

import "strings"

// Foo references /foo/{$}
func Foo() string { return "/foo/" }

// Bar references /bar/{slug}/{$}
func Bar(slug string) string {
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(
		len("/bar/") +
			len(slug) +
			len("/"),
	)
	b.WriteString("/bar/")
	b.WriteString(slug)
	b.WriteString("/")
	return b.String()
}

// Baz references /baz/{$}
func Baz(query QueryBaz) string {
	anyQuery := query.Q != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("/baz/")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}

	// n = number of query params already accounted for (for '&')
	n := 0

	if query.Q != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("q=") + len(query.Q)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("/baz/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}

	n = 0

	if query.Q != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("q=")
		b.WriteString(query.Q)
	}

	return b.String()
}

// QueryBaz is the query parameters for Baz
type QueryBaz struct {
	Q string `query:"q"`
}
